resumo: Senior Mobile & Full-Stack Engineer with 6+ years of experience building production-grade mobile and web applications. Specialized in React Native (Expo), Kotlin and Swift for native/cross-platform mobile development, with strong full-stack background in Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase (Auth/DB/Realtime) and PostgreSQL. Led mission-critical systems in agribusiness ERP, subscription streaming, B2B marketplaces and hospital management — from discovery and system design to App Store/Play Store deployment and long-term maintenance.

experiencia.descricao_empresa: 201-500 employees, Agricultural storage equipment (silos, dryers, grain handling)
atividades: Architect and lead development of GEM — enterprise ERP that replaces spreadsheet workflows with a real-time platform for production orders, Kanban tasks, expedition logistics and full audit logging.

Built the web platform with Next.js 15 (App Router, RSC), React 19, TypeScript, Supabase (Auth/DB/Realtime) and PostgreSQL (5,000+ lines of Prisma schema), deployed via Docker and Nginx on dedicated VPS.

Developed Kotlin backend services for production data processing; built native Kotlin Multiplatform tools (Compose Multiplatform + Ktor + SQLDelight) including GEM Exportador — automated CAD file conversion system with real-time queue monitoring via WebSocket, supporting PDF/DWG/DXF/STEP/IGES export from Autodesk Inventor.

Implemented real-time multi-user sync with Supabase Realtime (sub-200ms latency) and multi-layer caching (Zustand + TanStack Query + in-memory Map) for sub-second responses across 10,000+ production orders.
Built advanced Kanban system with drag-and-drop (dnd-kit), column customization, task grouping, subtasks with time tracking, attachments via Supabase Storage, and comments with mentions.
Implemented complete audit trail logging 20+ event types with before/after snapshots, and granular RBAC permission system (Admin, Manager, Expedition, Developer) with server-side validation.
Built desktop application with Tauri for offline-first workflows in factory environments with auto-updater and signed releases.
Reduced error rate in commercial proposals by 80% and increased monthly profit by approximately 14%.
Deployed to production with 100+ daily active users across multiple departments with 99.9% uptime over 6 months.

experiencia.descricao_empresa: Independent software consultant — enterprise-grade mobile and web applications
atividades: Deliver end-to-end mobile and web solutions for multiple clients using React Native, Kotlin, Swift, Next.js, Supabase and PostgreSQL, from requirements and UX collaboration to App Store/Play Store deployment and monitoring.

projetos.nome: Stormzplus – Subscription Streaming Platform (Mobile + Web + Admin)
projetos.descricao: Designed and built a full-stack subscription-based VOD platform with Netflix-style UX spanning mobile (React Native + Expo), web (Next.js 15), real-time Watch Party (LiveKit/WebRTC), admin CMS and GPU-accelerated video pipeline.
detalhes_mobile: Built production React Native app (RN 0.81 + Expo SDK 54) published on iOS App Store and Google Play Store — multi-profile accounts, HLS video playback via react-native-video and expo-video, offline downloads with file system APIs and intelligent cache management.
Implemented native video playback with hardware-accelerated HLS streaming, adaptive bitrate, 60fps performance across iOS and Android.
Built file-based routing with Expo Router for deep linking, enabling content sharing and direct navigation to shows/episodes/profiles.
Real-time data sync using SWR with automatic revalidation + Zustand for local state, sharing the same Supabase backend as web for seamless cross-platform experience.
Integrated WebRTC (react-native-webrtc) with custom signaling client for mobile Watch Party — synchronized group viewing with LiveKit.
Push notifications via Firebase for new content, episode releases and subscription reminders.
Animations with React Native Reanimated 4 and Lottie; internationalization with i18next (EN/PT-BR).
Configured native Swift modules for advanced iOS video playback controls, AirPlay support and picture-in-picture.
detalhes_web: Built the web platform with Next.js 15.3 (App Router, RSC), React 19, Supabase Auth/DB, PostgreSQL and Drizzle ORM — multi-profile accounts, curated content, watch progress, favorites and featured rows.
GPU-accelerated video pipeline: Go service orchestrating FFmpeg with NVIDIA NVENC across multiple codec ladders for multi-bitrate HLS transcoding.
HLS stored on Cloudflare R2 and distributed via CDN edge caching with immutable asset keys and far-future cache headers.
Stripe billing + Mercado Pago (PIX) with idempotent webhooks and full subscription lifecycle management.
Integrated LiveKit WebRTC SFU for real-time Watch Party feature enabling synchronized group viewing with chat.
Custom HLS video player with captions, resume playback, quality selector and resilient error handling.
Role-based gated routes with Supabase Auth and SSR middleware checks tied to subscription status.
Desktop app option with Tauri 2.9 for native performance.
detalhes_admin: Full content CMS: create/update/delete titles, seasons, episodes, genres, and featured spots.
Customer & subscription management: inspect accounts, handle plan changes, resolve invoice/payment issues.
Episode ingestion pipeline: attach sources, trigger FFmpeg encoding jobs, track processing status in real-time.
Asset management with Cloudflare R2 integration for media storage and CDN distribution.

projetos.descricao: Developed a B2B marketplace in construction with SEO-ready catalog, real-time quotes, vendor dashboards and subscription plans for a client.
detalhes: +500 active companies and contractors on the platform with 4.9 rating.
SEO-first architecture with SSR/ISR and indexable vendor/product pages driving organic growth.
Explore with search, filters by category/price/relevance; item comparison and cart/lists.
Multi-tenant vendor system with roles (admin, operator), audit trails and bulk product import.
PDF quote export via jsPDF shareable via WhatsApp/email.
Subscription plans (Basic/Plus/Premium) with zero selling fees, automatic boosted ranking, and operational dashboards with Recharts.

atividades: Developed mobile applications in React Native for hospital management systems, supporting flows from UI implementation to API integration and store delivery.
Implemented features such as biometric login, real-time data visualization dashboards and complex form workflows, improving usability for clinical and administrative users.
Integrated with hospital REST APIs for patient data, scheduling and inventory management.
Built and maintained web interfaces with Next.js for ISP management (customer data, billing, support flows).
Migrated legacy modules to modern React/Next.js, reducing complexity and enabling faster iterations on new features.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines and Git Flow versioning with GitLab.
Applied agile methodologies (Scrum and Kanban) for development sprints.
Managed PostgreSQL databases, designing schemas and optimizing queries for existing systems.
Developed scripts and report layouts, improving reliability and readability of financial and operational reports for clients.

projetos_opensource.descricao: Production-grade video ingestion and HLS transcoding system extracted from Stormzplus. Unlimited uploads via Go server with streaming I/O (tested 10GB+ files), local FFmpeg processing with NVIDIA NVENC GPU acceleration, Cloudflare R2 storage with CDN-ready URLs, and a modern Next.js 15 admin dashboard. Cross-platform.

certificacoes_mobile.nome: Developing Mobile Apps with React Native

certificacoes_fullstack.nome: IBM Full Stack Software Developer Professional Certificate

idiomas.detalhes: comfortable with technical communication and client meetings
